name: brainiac
description: Plugin marketplace for the Brainiac brain-substrate second-brain — kernel skills (kb-curator, promote, vault-ingestion, vault-eval, save-conversation, voice), an optional extras plugin (curation, improve, task-registrar, autoresearch), and brainiac-manager (host lifecycle: /brainiac-install). The kernel skills also auto-load from .claude/skills/ on a repo clone; this marketplace is the install path for a Claude Code user who is NOT working inside this repo, or who wants extras/lifecycle skills one command away.

plugins.name: brainiac-kernel
plugins.description: Core brain-substrate skills for daily second-brain use: kb-curator, promote, vault-ingestion, vault-eval, save-conversation, voice.

plugins.name: brainiac-extras
plugins.description: Optional maintenance/admin skills: curation (stale-link + revisit-queue lint), improve (session retrospective), task-registrar (scheduled-task registration), autoresearch (retrieval self-tuning loop).

plugins.name: brainiac-manager
plugins.description: Host lifecycle skills: /brainiac-install runs the full host install (clone/install.sh/search-verify/nightly registration/audit-key provisioning/registry write) in one command; /brainiac-health runs a one-command doctor+status+trend+heartbeat readout with a HEALTHY/DEGRADED/BROKEN verdict.
